title: shepherdia rotundifolia
intro: Shepherdia rotundifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain current or Buffalo berry, is a shrub-like plant native to the western United States and Canada. The medicinal properties of Shepherdia rotundifolia have been used to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and digestive issues, due to its high content of beta-amyrin and other compounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage. Shepherdia rotundifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and has been traditionally used by indigenous communities for its medicinal and culinary purposes.
